title: Lane closed, traffic redirected following Louis Fourie accident
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a notice of temporary road closure, following a motor vehicle accident on Louis Fourie Road today, 24 December.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a notice of temporary road closure, following a motor vehicle accident on Louis Fourie Road today, 24 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The lane in the direction of Hartenbos has been closed to traffic, from the Garret Street robots. Vehicles are being directed through Hartenbos."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At this stage, it is unclear how many vehicles were involved and if any injuries were sustained.","html":"At this stage, it is unclear how many vehicles were involved and if any injuries were sustained."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality has advised that motorists avoid the area if possible, exercise patience, and follow the instructions of traffic officials on site.","html":"The municipality has advised that motorists avoid the area if possible, exercise patience, and follow the instructions of traffic officials on site."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Lane closed, traffic redirected following Louis Fourie accident
